en.response: I can help with employment-law issues. Tell me a bit more about your situation — what happened, when, and what outcome you want.

sw.response: Naweza kusaidia masuala ya sheria ya ajira. Niambie zaidi kuhusu hali yako — kilichotokea, lini, na unataka nini.

en.response: File CMA Form 1 at the nearest CMA office within 60 days of the dispute. No fee. Include both parties' details, dispute date and facts, evidence (contract, payslips, dismissal letter, witness statements), and the remedy you seek. Mediation attendance is mandatory under LLA 4/2025.

sw.response: Jaza Fomu Na. 1 ya CMA katika ofisi ya CMA iliyo karibu ndani ya siku 60 ya mgogoro. Bila ada. Jumuisha taarifa za pande mbili, tarehe na ukweli, ushahidi (mkataba, slip za mshahara, barua ya kufukuzwa, taarifa za mashahidi), na suluhu unayoomba. Kuhudhuria ni lazima chini ya LLA 4/2025.

en.response: I can help with employment-law issues. Tell me a bit more about your situation — what happened, when, and what outcome you want.

sw.response: Naweza kusaidia masuala ya sheria ya ajira. Niambie zaidi kuhusu hali yako — kilichotokea, lini, na unataka nini.

sw.response: Naweza kusaidia masuala ya sheria ya ajira. Niambie zaidi kuhusu hali yako — kilichotokea, lini, na unataka nini.

en.response: Discrimination on protected grounds (tribe, race, sex, gender, pregnancy, disability, HIV/AIDS, etc.) is prohibited under ELRA s.7. File CMA Form 1 within 60 days. Compensation: 12-24 months remuneration under amended s.40.
en.citation: ELRA 2004 s.7; ELRA 2004 s.40 (as amended by LLA 4/2025)

sw.response: Ubaguzi kwa misingi iliyolindwa (kabila, rangi, jinsia, mimba, ulemavu, VVU n.k.) ni marufuku chini ya ELRA s.7. Peleka CMA Fomu 1 ndani ya siku 60. Fidia: miezi 12-24 chini ya s.40.
sw.citation: ELRA 2004 s.7; ELRA 2004 s.40 (as amended by LLA 4/2025)

en.response: This may be unfair termination under ELRA s.36. Burden of proof is on your employer. File CMA Form 1 within 60 days. Possible remedies under s.40 (LLA 4/2025): reinstatement, re-engagement, or compensation of 6-24 months remuneration depending on whether the procedure, reason, or both were unfair.
en.citation: ELRA 2004 s.36 (as amended by LLA 4/2025); CMA Rules; ELRA 2004 s.40 (as amended by LLA 4/2025)

sw.response: Hii inaweza kuwa kufukuzwa bila haki chini ya ELRA s.36. Mzigo wa uthibitisho ni wa mwajiri. Jaza Fomu Na. 1 ya CMA ndani ya siku 60. Suluhu chini ya s.40 (LLA 4/2025): kurudishwa, kuajiriwa upya, au fidia ya miezi 6-24.
sw.citation: ELRA 2004 s.36 (as amended by LLA 4/2025); CMA Rules; ELRA 2004 s.40 (as amended by LLA 4/2025)

en.response: Under amended ELRA s.14(1)(b) (LLA 4/2025), fixed-term is allowed only for: (1) temporary workload ≤12mo, (2) graduate trainee ≤24mo, (3) seasonal, (4) specific project, (5) non-citizen matched to work permit, (6) public scheme, (7) externally-funded, (8) retiree, (9) tender-based.

sw.response: Chini ya ELRA s.14(1)(b) (LLA 4/2025), fixed-term inaruhusiwa tu kwa: (1) kazi ya muda ≤miezi 12, (2) graduate trainee ≤miezi 24, (3) msimu, (4) mradi maalum, (5) raia wa kigeni=kibali, (6) miradi ya umma, (7) ufadhili wa nje, (8) wastaafu, (9) tenda.

en.response: I can help with employment-law issues. Tell me a bit more about your situation — what happened, when, and what outcome you want.

sw.response: Naweza kusaidia masuala ya sheria ya ajira. Niambie zaidi kuhusu hali yako — kilichotokea, lini, na unataka nini.

en.response: Sexual harassment at workplace by employer or co-employee is unlawful discrimination under ELRA s.7(4). Document each incident (date, words/actions, witnesses). File CMA Form 1 within 60 days. Remedies include compensation of 12-24 months remuneration under amended s.40.
en.citation: ELRA s.7(4); CMA Rules; ELRA 2004 s.40 (as amended by LLA 4/2025)

sw.response: Unyanyasaji wa kingono kazini ni ubaguzi haramu chini ya ELRA s.7(4). Hifadhi kila tukio (tarehe, maneno/vitendo, mashahidi). Peleka CMA Fomu 1 ndani ya siku 60. Suluhu: fidia ya miezi 12-24 chini ya s.40 (boresha).
sw.citation: ELRA s.7(4); CMA Rules; ELRA 2004 s.40 (as amended by LLA 4/2025)

en.response: I can help with employment-law issues. Tell me a bit more about your situation — what happened, when, and what outcome you want.

sw.response: Naweza kusaidia masuala ya sheria ya ajira. Niambie zaidi kuhusu hali yako — kilichotokea, lini, na unataka nini.

en.response: Under ELRA you are entitled to: 28 days annual leave (s.29); up to 126 days sick leave per 3-year cycle (s.32); 84 days paid maternity leave (s.33, plus premature-birth top-up to 40 weeks under LLA 4/2025); 3 days paternity (or 7 extra for premature birth); and up to 30 days unpaid leave on written request.
en.citation: ELRA 2004 s.29; ELRA 2004 s.32; ELRA 2004 s.33 (amended); ELRA 2004 s.34 (amended); LLA 4/2025

sw.response: Chini ya ELRA una haki za: siku 28 likizo ya mwaka (s.29); hadi siku 126 za ugonjwa kwa mzunguko wa miaka 3 (s.32); siku 84 za uzazi zenye malipo (s.33, pamoja na nyongeza kwa kuzaliwa kabla ya muda hadi wiki 40); siku 3 za baba (au siku 7 za ziada kwa premature); na hadi siku 30 za likizo bila malipo.
sw.citation: ELRA 2004 s.29; ELRA 2004 s.32; ELRA 2004 s.33 (amended); ELRA 2004 s.34 (amended); LLA 4/2025

en.response: The minimum age for employment is 14 years for light work only (no school disruption). 18 for hazardous work. Below 14 is unlawful under ELRA s.5. Report to the District Labour Office and police. ILO C138 and C182 ratified by Tanzania apply.
en.citation: ELRA s.5; ILO C138; ILO C182

sw.response: Umri wa chini ni 14 kwa kazi nyepesi tu. 18 kwa kazi hatari. Chini ya 14 ni haramu chini ya ELRA s.5. Ripoti Ofisi ya Kazi ya Wilaya na polisi.
sw.citation: ELRA s.5; ILO C138; ILO C182

en.response: Under ELRA s.41: 7 days notice in the first month of employment; thereafter 4 days for daily/weekly employees or 28 days for monthly employees. Notice must be in writing, state reasons, and not run during a leave period. Employer may pay in lieu of notice.

sw.response: Chini ya ELRA s.41: siku 7 katika mwezi wa kwanza; baadaye siku 4 (siku/wiki) au siku 28 (mwezi). Kwa maandishi, na sababu, isipite likizo. Mwajiri anaweza kulipa badala ya notisi.

en.response: I can help with employment-law issues. Tell me a bit more about your situation — what happened, when, and what outcome you want.

sw.response: Naweza kusaidia masuala ya sheria ya ajira. Niambie zaidi kuhusu hali yako — kilichotokea, lini, na unataka nini.

en.response: Overtime must be paid at 1.5x basic wage under ELRA s.19. Work on rest day or public holiday is paid at 2x. Maximum 12 hours overtime per week. Keep records of authorised overtime hours. Unpaid overtime is a CMA-referable dispute.

sw.response: Saa za ziada lazima zilipwe mara 1.5 ya mshahara chini ya ELRA s.19. Siku ya mapumziko au sikukuu: mara 2. Juu ya saa 12 za ziada kwa wiki. Hifadhi rekodi ya saa zilizoidhinishwa. Overtime isiyo na malipo ni mgogoro wa CMA.

en.response: Retrenchment under ELRA s.38 requires: (1) notice of intention as soon as contemplated; (2) disclosure of relevant information; (3) consultation on reasons, alternatives, selection criteria, timing, severance; (4) severance pay of 7 days basic × years served (cap 10). If the procedure was skipped, refer to CMA.

sw.response: Retrenchment chini ya ELRA s.38 inahitaji: (1) notisi ya nia mapema; (2) kutoa taarifa muhimu; (3) majadiliano kuhusu sababu, mbadala, vigezo, muda, kifuta jasho; (4) kifuta jasho cha siku 7 × miaka (hadi 10). Iwapo utaratibu haukufuatwa, peleka CMA.

en.response: Under ELRA s.42, severance pay = 7 days basic wage × completed years of service (capped at 10 years). Daily basic = monthly wage / 26. Severance is NOT payable if termination is for misconduct. Tell me your monthly wage and years of service and I'll compute the exact amount.

sw.response: Chini ya ELRA s.42, kifuta jasho = siku 7 za mshahara wa msingi × miaka iliyokamilika (hadi miaka 10). Mshahara wa siku = mshahara wa mwezi / 26. HAKILIPWI kwa utovu wa nidhamu. Niambie mshahara wako wa mwezi na miaka ya kazi nikuhesabie.

en.response: For a crops and animal production worker in agriculture, the minimum wage is TZS 175,000/month under GN 605A/2025 (effective 1 Jan 2026). If you are paid below this, you may file with CMA within 60 days to recover the difference plus interest.

sw.response: Kwa crops and animal production agriculture, kima cha chini ni TZS 175,000/mwezi chini ya GN 605A/2025 (inaanza 1 Jan 2026). Iwapo unalipwa chini, unaweza kupeleka CMA ndani ya siku 60 kurudisha tofauti pamoja na riba.

sw.response: Naweza kusaidia masuala ya sheria ya ajira. Niambie zaidi kuhusu hali yako — kilichotokea, lini, na unataka nini.

en.response: Report the injury immediately to your employer in writing AND to the Workers Compensation Fund (WCF). File the WCF claim within 12 months of injury. Under WCA 2008 you may receive medical treatment, periodic payments while disabled, and lump-sum compensation.

sw.response: Ripoti jeraha haraka kwa mwajiri kwa maandishi NA Mfuko wa Fidia ya Wafanyakazi (WCF). Wasilisha madai WCF ndani ya miezi 12. Chini ya WCA 2008 una haki ya matibabu, malipo ya muda wa ulemavu, na fidia ya jumla.

en.response: Report the injury immediately to your employer in writing AND to the Workers Compensation Fund (WCF). File the WCF claim within 12 months of injury. Under WCA 2008 you may receive medical treatment, periodic payments while disabled, and lump-sum compensation.

sw.response: Ripoti jeraha haraka kwa mwajiri kwa maandishi NA Mfuko wa Fidia ya Wafanyakazi (WCF). Wasilisha madai WCF ndani ya miezi 12. Chini ya WCA 2008 una haki ya matibabu, malipo ya muda wa ulemavu, na fidia ya jumla.
